infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SpecAR uses your camera to let you place and preview furniture in your real room using Augmented Reality.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SpecAR saves screenshots of your AR furniture previews to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SpecAR saves AR preview screenshots to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: SpecAR uses your camera to show furniture in your real room via Augmented Reality.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SpecAR to save AR screenshots to your photos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow SpecAR to save AR screenshots.
